Title: The Abyss
Writer: Richard Holm, Robin Sherlock Holm, Nicola Sinclair
Actors: Tuva Novotny, Peter Franzén, Kardo Razzazi
Plot: Frigga, who tries to balance her risky job as a security manager in the Kiirunavaara mine with her family life, has to fight for her life and the lives of her loved ones when her city starts collapsing into the mine.
